hero.description: LabelAlly Entertainment helps artists, labels, and creators distribute their music, manage YouTube channels, protect content rights, and grow across leading global platforms.

primaryCta.ariaLabel: Distribute your music — contact LabelAlly Entertainment

image.alt: Independent music artist performing with a guitar

about.heading: Your Trusted Digital Partner Dedicated To

features.title: Creator-Centric Approach
features.description: Every strategy we develop is tailored to amplify your unique voice and connect with your target audience authentically.

features.title: Transparent Growth
features.description: We believe in complete transparency with detailed analytics, regular reporting, and clear communication at every step.

features.title: Global Reach
features.description: We leverage our extensive network of 150+ platforms across 80+ countries to maximize your global presence and revenue.

services.heading: Everything You Need to Grow
services.description: From distribution to marketing, sync licensing to artist development — we provide the full spectrum of services that modern music professionals require.

items.title: Music Distribution
items.description: Distribute your music to all major streaming platforms and digital stores worldwide — quickly and professionally.

items.title: YouTube Channel Management
items.description: End-to-end management of your YouTube presence — uploads, metadata, optimization, and audience growth.

items.title: Content Rights Management
items.description: Protect and manage your intellectual property with comprehensive rights management across digital platforms.

items.title: YouTube CMS & Content ID
items.description: Leverage YouTube's Content ID system to track, manage, and monetize your music across user-generated content.

items.title: OTT Distribution
items.description: Reach audiences on over-the-top streaming platforms — expanding your content's reach beyond traditional channels.

items.title: Revenue Optimization
items.description: Maximize your earnings through strategic royalty collection, platform monetization, and revenue stream management.

howItWorks.heading: Simple Steps to Get Started
howItWorks.description: We keep things straightforward — so you can focus on making music while we handle the rest.

steps.title: Get in Touch
steps.description: Reach out through our contact page. Tell us about your music, your goals, and what you need from a partner.

steps.title: Strategy & Consultation
steps.description: We assess your needs and build a tailored plan — covering distribution, rights management, and growth opportunities.

steps.title: Onboarding & Setup
steps.description: We set up your distribution, channel management, and rights systems — professionally and efficiently.

steps.title: Launch & Grow
steps.description: Your music goes live across all platforms. We monitor performance and continuously optimize for maximum impact.

whyChoose.heading: The Partner That Puts You First
whyChoose.description: We built LabelAlly Entertainment around one principle — your success is our success. Everything we offer is designed to give artists, labels, and brands a genuine competitive advantage.

benefits.title: Full-Service Approach
benefits.description: From distribution to rights management to marketing — we handle every part of your music business under one roof.

benefits.title: Global Reach
benefits.description: Your music distributed to every major platform worldwide, reaching listeners wherever they are.

benefits.title: Artist-First Philosophy
benefits.description: Every decision we make is guided by what is best for the artist and their long-term career — not just short-term gains.

benefits.title: Dedicated Support
benefits.description: A professional team that understands the music industry and is available to guide you at every stage.

benefits.title: Transparent Process
benefits.description: Clear communication, honest reporting, and no hidden fees — you always know exactly where your music and money stand.

benefits.title: Fast & Efficient
benefits.description: Professional onboarding and rapid distribution so your music gets to market without unnecessary delays.

artists.heading: Built for Every Music Professional
artists.description: Whether you are an independent artist, an established label, or a brand looking to leverage music — LabelAlly Entertainment has the services and expertise to support your goals.

cta.label: Artists, Labels & Partners
cta.ariaLabel: Learn about LabelAlly Entertainment's work with artists, labels, and partners

categories.title: Independent Artists
categories.description: We empower independent artists with the same professional tools and distribution network previously available only to major labels.

categories.title: Record Labels
categories.description: Partner with us for comprehensive distribution, rights management, and revenue optimization across your entire catalog.

categories.title: Brands & Agencies
categories.description: Leverage sync licensing and content rights management to place music across campaigns, productions, and digital platforms.

analytics.heading: Complete Control Over Your Revenue & Rights
analytics.description: Gain full visibility into your catalog's performance and earnings. We collect data from every major platform and compile it into transparent, easy-to-understand reports.

features.title: Transparent Reporting
features.description: Detailed dashboards that show exactly where your plays, streams, and revenue are coming from.

features.title: Rights & Content ID Auditing
features.description: Continuous monitoring of digital platforms to identify, claim, and monetize UGC featuring your tracks.

features.title: Multi-Channel Royalties
features.description: Consolidated payouts covering mechanicals, public performance, digital streams, and sync licensing.

analytics.supportingNote: Data collected daily and updated regularly. Payouts are made directly to your preferred method.

cta.label: Contact Us for Details
cta.ariaLabel: Contact us to learn more about our reporting and payment schedules

testimonials.heading: Trusted by Music Professionals
testimonials.description: We are proud to support independent creators, record labels, and creative brands in achieving their goals.

finalCta.heading: Ready to Amplify Your Music Business?
finalCta.description: Partner with LabelAlly Entertainment today. Let us manage your distribution, channel growth, and content rights while you focus on creating music.
